items.title: Duckett and Stokes wrestle Trent Bridge Test back England's way
items.summary: Ben Duckett and Ben Stokes were at the heart of a stirring England fightback on day two of the series-deciding third Test against New Zealand at Trent Bridge.

items.title: Haaland on Norway bench but Mbappe starts, plus Senegal vs Iraq LIVE!
Ireland seal historic first win against India
items.summary: Ireland stunned India to seal their first victory against their opponents in any format, as captain Lorcan Tucker's half-century led his side to a historic 34-run win in Stormont.

items.title: Rice back in England training but James misses out again
items.summary: Declan Rice returns to England training on Friday, but Reece James again misses out and remains a doubt to face Panama.

items.title: Bellamy still 'absolutely committed' to Wales - FAW chief
items.summary: Football Association of Wales chief executive Noel Mooney expects Craig Bellamy to stay on as Wales head coach after the collapse of his proposed move to Burnley.
